steps.title: Apply the given relationship by substitution
steps.content:
We're given $t = 4u$ and need to find what $2t$ equals. Substitute the relationship directly into the expression:
$$2t = 2(4u)$$

steps.title: Multiply to get the answer
steps.content:
Multiply the coefficient 2 by the expression in parentheses:
$$2(4u) = 8u$$
This confirms A is correct.
